files_to_modify.reason: Add data-testid="onboarding-next" to Next button (missing, required by onboarding E2E test)
Add data-testid="pin-pad" to outer wrapper div (missing, required by parent-dashboard E2E test)
235 lines → exceeds 200-line limit. Extract SongLyricsPanel component to reduce to ≤200 lines
start-session-btn has min-h-[64px] (64px < 88px) and parent-icon has w-12 h-12 (48px < 88px). Fix both tap targets to ≥88px

files_to_create.reason: Playwright E2E test configuration: Chromium only, iPhone SE viewport (375x667), 30s timeout, webServer using npm run dev
Helper to seed IndexedDB via page.evaluate() with onboarding-complete settings and SHA-256 PIN hash for '1234'
E2E test: full onboarding wizard → home screen with name, then reload verifies IndexedDB persistence
E2E test: guided session flow (greeting → mood → explore cards × 3 → celebration overlay)
E2E test: all 4 activity routes accessible from home screen, audio button visible
E2E test: PIN pad → wrong PIN × 2 (error state) → correct PIN → dashboard → word detail sheet
Cross-cutting sanity: no hardcoded API keys, no component >200 lines, activity routes render content, audio buttons have aria-label, tap targets ≥88px
Extracted from SongPlayer: renders the scrollable lyrics list with word chips. Reduces SongPlayer.tsx to ≤200 lines

steps.description: Install @playwright/test and Chromium browser: npm install --save-dev @playwright/test && npx playwright install chromium
Fix StepAge.tsx: add data-testid='onboarding-next' to the Next button
Fix PinPad.tsx: add data-testid='pin-pad' to outer wrapper div
Fix HomeScreen.tsx: change start-session-btn min-h-[64px]→min-h-[88px] and parent-icon w-12 h-12→w-[88px] h-[88px]
Extract SongLyricsPanel.tsx from SongPlayer.tsx to bring SongPlayer under 200 lines
Update package.json: add @playwright/test to devDependencies, add test:e2e script
Run npx playwright test and iterate on failures
git add, commit, push; write pr-body.md

expected_tests: tests/e2e/session.spec.ts — guided session from home to celebration
tests/e2e/parent-dashboard.spec.ts — PIN pad, wrong PIN errors, correct PIN, word detail sheet
tests/e2e/sanity.spec.ts — no hardcoded keys, no big components, tap targets, aria-labels

risk_areas.mitigation: Navigate to page first to trigger DB init via getDB(), then seed via page.evaluate() using raw indexedDB API
Compute hash dynamically in browser context using crypto.subtle, not hardcoded
Extract only the purely presentational lyrics panel, keep all state in SongPlayer
Tests only check element visibility, not audio playback. Howler may throw but won't crash the UI
Playwright's built-in auto-wait handles element visibility after animations within 30s timeout
Test clicks session-proceed-btn immediately; waitForSelector handles the timing
Seed a completed session record in DB seed helper so dashboard shows stats and streak-calendar

persistence_strategy: IndexedDB via idb library. All user data (settings, progress, sessions) stored client-side. Tests seed IndexedDB via page.evaluate() using the raw indexedDB browser API after triggering DB initialization by navigating to the app.
error_handling_approach: All async operations in the app already have try/catch with user-facing error states. Tests verify error states (wrong PIN shows error text). Sanity tests use Node fs which is synchronous, no async errors expected.

tap_target_fixes.start-session-btn: Change min-h-[64px] to min-h-[88px] in HomeScreen.tsx
tap_target_fixes.parent-icon: Change w-12 h-12 (48px) to w-[88px] h-[88px] in HomeScreen.tsx

missing_testids.onboarding-next_on_StepAge: StepAge Next button line 62 — add data-testid='onboarding-next'
missing_testids.pin-pad_on_PinPad: PinPad outer wrapper div line 44 — add data-testid='pin-pad'

component_size_violations.SongPlayer.tsx: 235 lines → extract SongLyricsPanel.tsx, reduces SongPlayer to ~185 lines
